title: The future of user interfaces
body:
Touch screens are already the present, to some of us a mobile phone with a traditional keyboard already seems outdated.

These screens are growing and gestures and interaction with multiple fingers are already a reality.

Microsoft shows us in this well-made video how these user interfaces could be and how we would interact with them.

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Zp-\_oUwdSeY&feature=related

Really spectacular, some of these ideas we will see in a very distant future.

What do you think about the future of user interfaces?
